title: Teach For India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Teach For India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!
